meta.note: Deductibles in USD. Synthetic policies derived deterministically from the regenerated valuations (limit 90-100% of replacementValue, windstorm deductible 2%, named-storm 3%). Regenerated 2026-06-12 for the 290-property dataset; not real policy terms. POL-STORMPATH-006 and POL-GPS0041213 are intentionally underinsured (limits cut at 2026 renewal) so the demo shows nonzero insuranceGap values.

exclusions: Roof over 20 years actual cash value only
policies.note: Carrier cut the windstorm limit at the 2026 renewal due to roof age/condition; intentionally underinsured so the frontend demo portfolio (Tampa / PF-002) shows a visible insuranceGap.
